title: Jack Demands Raizo
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on jack demands raizo within the Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: [Zou's] left foot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now that the crew has finally reunited, what awaits them...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: pant... pant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that's as much as we can handle today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ete...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MMM... let's continue tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Zou [right belly for]

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Try some of our famous "monkey wine"... made from the fruits of the beautiful forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now this looks pretty tasty right here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get the hell off'a me Damnit !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not yer' personal jungle > gym!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EHHAH?! C'mon, don't be like that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: LICK THIS, YOU GODDAMNED CREEPS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, no need to get so riled up, zero!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look at everything these people have given us!! You're being totally rude!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just a little glompy- j(glomp !!!

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Just a little garchuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, try and look past what culture differences we may have.

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: To us, "minkship*** is how we show our friend- ship to one another.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yu!!! Uummmm!! What kinda meat is this anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm... Hippo, lizard, crocodile, and frog.... We won't eat anything with fur on it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PANT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: e....e... everyone !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAAH... HAH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I read the newspaper!! I'm so glad you're all okay!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: TheX relief !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Brook~!!! Why do you look like you got the crap beat outta ya'?!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Luffy-Saaaaan!! I'm so sorry about what happened to Sanji!!! I don't even think I can face you right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: though... I guess I don't have a face to begin with!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?! weren't you together with momo?

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Yes... of course, he's fine... but he really doesn't do well with the Minks...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: He's locked himself up in his room and refuses to come out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...but perhaps this is for the best.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Why "Samurai"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Well, the thing is... this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If I could have all you newcomers to you gather around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're lookin' alive and well, brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...where is Kinemon-San Right Now...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: hmmm... He should have reached us by now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...this is of the upmost importance, as long as we're in this kingdom, whatever you do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It would dig up wounds in many of the people here... and you might end up inadvertently incurring their wrath.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Do not mention the words "Samurai" or "Wano Kingdom"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've found you ...!! Baron corpse!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Gasp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ... Corpse ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Go to the Right Belly Forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Your Comrade's corpse is there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahhh ...!! &

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So that's what she meant by our Comrade's corpse!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...ah yes, we call him that out of affection.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Talk about a seriously misleading nickname ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But to be honest, we were really shocked... to think that such marvelous... FAS- cinating... Beings exist in this world...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: We "Caine Minks" just ado-Re Bones :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heeeelp Meee~ I'm not a chew toy~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: well... whatever floats your boat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: By the way, where's Tra-guy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh, he's in the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Bear Forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Anyways, what are we going to do about Sanji- Kun?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Relax... he sent a letter, didn't he? He'll work something out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ....hmmm... and it's not like he was captured or anything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Would the two of you please treat this with a greater sense of Urgency?!!!

summary: Jack Demands Raizo: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
